briefing.headline: Rig up a Shakyhead — steady winter approach for stained water.
briefing.gameplan:
The Shakyhead is a strong choice for winter with stained water and stable conditions.

Palaniuk: 'Extremely cold (42 degrees or below) and warmer than 90 degrees are prime conditions for a shaky-head. At cold extremes, fish are just up shallow beginning to get aggressive but not ready to eat a jig. A shaky-head is a small weedless finesse bait that's easy for lethargic fish to eat.'

Key adjustment for stable: moderate cadence — match the natural pace of local forage.

primaryApproach.targets: Focus on riprap, creek channel, grass. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Palaniuk: 'Bass realize they can either chase prey and burn energy, or chill out in the shade, burn less energy and eat less. A shaky-head is a good way to pick off bigger fish out of brush piles that
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on riprap, creek channel, grass. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: KVD: On lowland reservoirs with grass (Guntersville, Toledo Bend, Okeechobee), bass don't leave shallow areas even in extreme cold. They stage in slightly deeper areas adjacent to spawning flats — drains, ditches, depressions, holes in the grass. ...

Wheeler: On highland reservoirs like Cherokee, smallmouth live around holes/depressions (20 ft around the side) — if rock is around them the smallies live there. If a rock vein goes into the middle, they live on those veins. The holes harbor the b...

briefing.depthStrategy: Stable winter conditions position bass at 15-35ft on main lake structure — bluffs, steep points, channel bends. Fish are lethargic and grouped tight. Vertical presentations directly on structure are essential.
adjustIf: If conditions suddenly shift (pressure drop, wind change), be ready to speed up your approach — transitional moments produce big bites
If water clears significantly, downsize presentations and move to natural color patterns
If you get followers without commits, add scent or downsize your hook/weight
